artifact: A job-search report marks a role PASS on compensation. The posting quotes: 'Base salary: $47,000 per year.' The job-seeker's required minimum base is $55,000/year.
artifact_swapped: A job-search report marks a role PASS on compensation. The job-seeker's required minimum base is $55,000/year. The posting quotes: 'Base salary: $47,000 per year.'
why_objective: Pure arithmetic: 47000 < 55000, so the stated base is below the stated floor. The PASS is incorrect regardless of any judgment. Incontestable.
